title: HELOC vs. Refinance: What the Notarization Process Looks Like for Each
excerpt: Tapping your home equity? Whether you're doing a HELOC or a full refinance, the notarization process is different — and getting it wrong delays your funding. Here's what to expect for each.
seoTitle: HELOC vs Refinance Notarization in Charlotte NC | Integrity Closings CLT
seoDescription: HELOC or refinance — the notarization process looks different for each. This guide explains what to expect, what documents get signed, and why a loan signing agent matters for both.
